prompt: Creative macro photography. A person lying flat on the ground face-up, beside a giant naturally colored ANIMAL also lying flat on the ground. Both looking directly upward into the camera with blinking expressive eyes. Fisheye lens, top-down overhead selfie perspective, as if both are taking a selfie together. Pure USER_COLOR solid background decorated with hand-drawn cartoon cute creative doodle lines. Behind both subjects, oversized bold semi-transparent white block letters read "BG_TEXT". At the top-left, ultra-fine sans-serif white font reads "{{TOP_LEFT}}". At the top-center, "2026". At the top-right, "{{TOP_RIGHT}}". At the bottom-left, "{{BOTTOM_TEXT}}". At the bottom-right, "{{BOTTOM_TEXT}}". All text is ultra-fine sans-serif white, consistent in size and weight across all images.
